release_notes: v0.3.5.1 (BP083 hotfix): Mesh Comparison A (Cold) Ollama reachability fix. gemma4:12b is a thinking model — num_predict:16 truncated inside thinking blocks, causing 0 A answers. Fixed: num_predict raised to 256, think:false added to all MCQ letter-extraction calls (A Cold path + 3-voter concordance). Diagnostic [MeshA-DIAG] logging added.
